summary: Senior Software Engineer specializing in .NET Core, distributed systems, and cloud-native architecture. Proven experience designing multi-tenant SaaS platforms, event-driven pipelines, and resilient DevOps workflows, with a strong focus on scalability, reliability, and system design. Based in Ontario, Canada.

skills.programming: C#, SQL, TypeScript, Linux commands, HTML5+, CSS3+
skills.software: ASP.NET Core Web API & MVC, React, Windows Services, Background Services, Bootstrap
skills.frameworks: Docker/Podman, Self-hosting, AWS, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Docker Registry, Grafana
skills.designPatterns: Microservices, Clean Architecture, CQRS, Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA), Domain-Driven Design, Event Sourcing
skills.productivityTools: Keycloak, RabbitMQ, NATS, Redis, Nginx, SEQ, TLS/Let's Encrypt, Axios, Redux, Entity Framework, Git, GitHub Actions
skills.extra: .NET Core SaaS platforms, event-driven pipelines, multi-tenant systems, legacy modernization, cloud-to-on-prem integrations, observability, resilience, AWS managed infrastructure, and DevOps automation

professionalExperience.productName: Retail Solutions Central - RSC (.NET Core 9 | React | DevOps):
projectDescription: Architected and developed a cloud-native retail platform by modernizing a legacy on-prem system into a scalable multi-tenant SaaS solution using .NET Core, React, and PostgreSQL.

Designed an event-driven data pipeline to stream sales transaction data from on-prem systems using encrypted JSON, Windows services, Polly retry/circuit breaker policies, and RabbitMQ with DLQ for reliable processing.
Built a distributed processing system with sequential queue-based execution, dynamic tenant resolution, and runtime migrations to ensure data consistency and fault-tolerant ingestion.
Implemented multi-tenant architecture supporting database-per-tenant and schema-based isolation, enabling flexible scaling based on subscription tiers.
Developed a React cloud dashboard and retail management system using TypeScript, Redux, EN/FR localization, and Keycloak OAuth2 authentication with realm-based tenancy.
Enabled hybrid cloud-to-on-prem communication using NATS messaging for secure real-time interaction between cloud services and local client systems.

Containerized platform services using Podman/Docker and deployed them on a self-hosted Kubernetes cluster running on Linux VMs, enabling orchestration, workload distribution, and horizontal scaling of backend and queue-processing services.

Automated CI/CD pipelines using self-hosted GitHub Actions runners and a private Docker registry, enabling versioned deployments, rollback capability, and secure TLS-enabled infrastructure across multiple environments.

Implemented observability and resilience strategies using SEQ, Grafana, correlation IDs, circuit breakers, and controlled connection handling, improving traceability and maintaining system stability during service failures.

projectLink.linkDesc: Username and password can be provided during the interview.
View the hybrid cloud architecture diagram.

projectDescription: Engineered a .NET Core CMS and backend APIs using event-driven patterns, async/await, Tasks, and Semaphores to enable scalable concurrent processing, deploying containerized workloads on Amazon ECS to ensure high responsiveness and fault-tolerant system behavior.

Built secure and scalable REST APIs supporting authentication (OAuth2), payments and subscriptions, and data synchronization using Entity Framework and MS SQL Server, leveraging Amazon RDS and AWS managed infrastructure to deliver reliable web and mobile experiences.

Developed a responsive React SPA with Redux for centralized state management and deployed front-end assets through Amazon S3 and Amazon CloudFront, improving performance, user experience, and API-driven interactions.
Automated CI/CD pipelines to streamline build, testing, and deployment workflows, reducing manual release effort and improving release reliability.

professionalExperience.productName: Disney BYJU'S Early Learn App (C# | .NET Core 6 | React):
projectDescription: Developed high-scale .NET Core APIs handling 10,000+ requests per minute, supporting subscriptions, session management, and CDN-based content delivery while maintaining availability and performance under heavy traffic.

Designed and developed a microservices-based backend architecture using .NET Core, RabbitMQ, and Kubernetes, enabling reliable service-to-service communication, asynchronous processing, scalable deployments, and improved fault isolation.
Optimized system performance using Redis caching, parallel processing, and API-level improvements, reducing server load by approximately 40% and improving response times across distributed services.
Led engineering initiatives including system design, code reviews, production releases, and North America deployments, improving delivery quality, team productivity, and business alignment.
Developed Web APIs for mobile applications using .NET Framework and SQL Server to support CDN content, user progress, leaderboards, module updates, subscriptions, and enrollments.
Designed database schemas and implemented N-tier architecture with SOLID principles to improve application performance, scalability, maintainability, and system reliability.
Developed a scalable e-commerce web application using ASP.NET Core MVC, MS SQL Server, Entity Framework, and responsive Bootstrap UI patterns.
Integrated AJAX and JSON-driven interactions with dynamic pages, layouts, view components, and data-driven business workflows.
Integrated Stripe for secure payment processing within the checkout session.
Built a high-fidelity simulation application for Japanese electric scooter maker Okinawa Motors to showcase new models and product features.
Distributed the application to Tamil Nadu Okinawa dealers on iPads and Macs for showroom presentations.
